steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
Plug $x=3$ into $f(x)=x^3+19$. This is the requested input, so the function value will be $f(3)$.
$f(3)=3^3+19$

steps.title: Compute the function value
steps.content: Evaluate the power first, then add. $f(3)=27+19=46$ The output is $46$. The answer is 46.
